case_title: RICHARD E. JORGENSEN RESPONDENT VS. ALCATRAZ MEDIA LLC APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT ALCATRAZ MEDIA LLC AS TO RESPONDENT JORGENSEN, RICHARD E. HEARING SET FOR JUL-13-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 815105
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2006 - JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-13-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2006 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JULY 13, 2006 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT JORGENSEN, RICHARD E. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ALCATRAZ MEDIA LLC $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,052.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THIS APPEAL WAS PROPERLY FROM THE DENIAL OF MOTION TO VACATE HEARD APRIL 27, 2006. NO EVIDENCE WAS SUBMITTED REGARDING THE APPELLANT'S ALLEGED INABILITY TO APPEAR, AND THE APPEAL IS DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-14-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:19am
Judge Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent Richard E. Jorgenson appears in Pro Per; Appellant Alcatraz Media LLC, appears in Pro Per, through representative, Ryan Windsor.
Appearing with the respondent is John Moran.
10:25am
Based on testimony from Mr. Jorgenson, and after reviewing the file, the Court determines it should hear the Motion to Vacate first. Yuriko Kawaguchi, who appeared at the 1st Motion to Vacate to ask for a continuance, is present in court. Ms. Kawaguchi is sworn as a witness.
10:31am
The matter of the Motion to Vacate is submitted. The Court states for the record that Appellant Alcatraz Media LLC is subject to Court jurisdiction because it sold tickets in California and subject to California law.
10:33am
The Court then hears the appeal. Mr. Jorgenson presents his case in the narrative.
10:40am
Judge Myles questions Mr. Windsor
10:45am
EXHA Photo showing Mr. Jorgenson
Mr. Moran testifies in the narrative
10:55am
Matter is submitted. Previous evidence from previous hearing is returned to Mr. Jorgenson
